🛠️ System Tools Collection

All your favorite scripts integrated into one GUI application

Clear DNS Cache

Click the button to clear DNS cache...

Git Pull All Repositories

Enter disk and path, then click Run Git Pull...

Force Kill Process

Enter a PID and click Kill Process...

View Process by PID

Enter a PID and click View Process...

View Processes Using Port

Enter a port number and click View Port Usage...

Laravel Queue Worker

Enter disk and path, then click Run Schedule...

Hyperf Skeleton Docker

Click the button to get the Docker command...

Supervisor Commands

Click the button to view supervisor commands...

Fiddler Image Download Script

Click the button to view the Fiddler script...

System Information

Click the button to view system information...
